productName: ThunderStix BLUNT-Tilted-DOH-glass tip preroll(1.2g) / Ripped Off Runtz (H)
description: A hybrid infused blunt built around Ripped off Runtz and enhanced with extract, blended in for a smooth, even burn and an elevated experience. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of chemical, blueberry, and berry, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
